
;;;; the comma only works in match 
  (= 
    (test-func2 $b) 
    (let $a 
      (, hello $b) $a))
  !(assertEqualToResult 
    (test-func2 world) 
    ( (, hello world)))

[

;
;; ANTI-REGRESSION.COMMA-IS-NOT-SPECIAL.01

; 
; EVAL TEST
; took 0.000818 secs. (818.29 microseconds) 

  !(assertEqualToResult 
    (test-func2 world) 
    ( (, hello world)))

  (loonit_success  
    (equal_enough_for_test  
      ( (, hello world)) 
      ( (, hello world))))


  (= (error  (existence_error  procedure (/  trace_on_pass 0)) (context  (:  system (/   1)) $_5588))  
    (,  
      (eval_H  500 &self 
        (assertEqualToResult 
          (test-func2 world) 
          ( (, hello world))) $_3524) 
      (,  
        (deterministic  $_3848) 
        (,  
          (xform_out  $_3524 $_3876) 
          (nb_setarg  1 
            (res  $_3320) $_3876)))))




  (= (error  (existence_error  procedure (/  trace_on_pass 0)) (context  (:  system (/   1)) $_5588))  
    (,  
      (eval_H  500 &self 
        (assertEqualToResult 
          (test-func2 world) 
          ( (, hello world))) $_3524) 
      (,  
        (deterministic  $_3848) 
        (,  
          (xform_out  $_3524 $_3876) 
          (nb_setarg  1 
            (res  $_3320) $_3876)))))
